title: calandrinia strophiolata
intro: Calandrinia strophiolata, also known as the "Wishbone Plant", is a species of flowering plant in the family Portulacaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Calandrinia strophiolata can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to support digestive health and reduce symptoms of illness.
